trans-unit.source: By default, QGIS visualizes all layers in the `Single symbol` setting.
trans-unit.target: By default, QGIS visualizes all layers in the `Single symbol` setting.

trans-unit.source: This means all the features of a layer are visualised the same.
trans-unit.target: This means all the features of a layer are visualised the same.

trans-unit.source: In this setting, you can change many parameters like colour or opacity __but you can't classify any data!__
trans-unit.target: In this setting, you can change many parameters like colour or opacity __but you can't classify any data!__

trans-unit.source: __To adjust the style of a layer...__
trans-unit.target: __To adjust the style of a layer...__

trans-unit.source: Confirm that the layer setting is on `Single Symbol`.
trans-unit.target: Confirm that the layer setting is on `Single Symbol`.

trans-unit.source: Select the colour of your choice in the drop-down menu. For more colour options select in the drop-down menu `Choose Color`.
trans-unit.target: Select the colour of your choice in the drop-down menu. For more colour options select in the drop-down menu `Choose Color`.

trans-unit.source: *Optional*: You can adjust the opacity/ transparency of the layer. This can be very useful when you want to show multiple overlapping layers.
trans-unit.target: *Optional*: You can adjust the opacity/ transparency of the layer. This can be very useful when you want to show multiple overlapping layers.

trans-unit.source: *Optional*: Here you can set the unit type. This is useful when you want to, for example, visualise points in a certain size.
trans-unit.target: *Optional*: Here you can set the unit type. This is useful when you want to, for example, visualise points in a certain size.

trans-unit.source: Optional. Here you can find standard and previously used styles quickly.
trans-unit.target: Optional. Here you can find standard and previously used styles quickly.

trans-unit.source: Click `Apply` to put your adjustment into effect.
trans-unit.target: Click `Apply` to put your adjustment into effect.

trans-unit.source: %% EDIT: The green numbers are not so easy to read. Switch to red numbers.
trans-unit.target: %% EDIT: The green numbers are not so easy to read. Switch to red numbers.
